title: ASR Outdoor 1lb Rough Genuine Gemstone Gold Panning Kit, 5pc (Many Styles)
description:
Learn how to pan for gold with this six piece ASR Outdoor gold pan kit for beginners. This exciting new prospecting starter gold panning kit includes engineered gold paydirt by professional prospector Bobby Bo. With this kit, you'll be able to learn and practice gold panning techniques at home without having to travel to a claim site. The ASR Outdoor six piece gold panning kit is an excellent option for kids and beginners who are just getting started in gold prospecting. Inside the kit, we’ve included six essential prospecting equipment tools to learn the basics of gold panning. You'll find a 10" dual riffle gold pan that will help you start identifying and collecting gold

ASR Outdoor 1lb Rough Genuine Gemstone Gold Panning Kit, 5pc (Many Styles)

Embark on an exciting adventure with the ASR Outdoor 5pc Gemstone Mining Kit! This all-in-one kit includes everything you need to dig, sift, and discover beautiful gemstones in your very own paydirt. Whether you're a seasoned prospector or a beginner, this kit is perfect for bringing the thrill of gemstone discovery right to your fingertips.

Key Features

  • 5PC GEMSTONE GOLD RUSH KIT - This ASR Outdoor Gemstone Mining Kit comes with essential items to enjoy the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious minerals: 1x 1-pound bag of rough gemstones, a plastic sieve, a trowel, a brush, and magnifying glass tweezers.
  • DIVERSE PAYDIRT EXPERIENCE - Featuring 1lb of carefully curated material, this bag of gemstones provides a fun and rewarding gold panning or sifting experience. Discover, clean, and polish your very own gemstones out in the field!
  • PLASTIC SAND SIFTER - The kit comes with a 9.75” x 9.75” classifying sieve ideal for sifting through your gemstones and paydirt. The sieve has 36 holes per square inch, comes with convenient handles, and is made of durable plastic designed for use in any weather.
  • COLLECTION ACCESSORIES - We’ve also added a durable plastic trowel, a brush, and magnifying tweezers for collecting, cleaning, and studying your findings. Accessories are ideal fine mineral recovery tools for prospecting enthusiasts.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Gemstone bag size: 1lb; Collection tool materials: plastic, metal, glass; Number of pieces included: 5; Colors: assorted

Product Specifications

  • MPN: GEM5PCKITPARENT

With 1lb of carefully curated gemstone material, you’ll enjoy hours of excitement as you sift, clean, and polish your own gems. The durable 9.75” x 9.75” plastic sand sifter with 36 holes per square inch is ideal for separating gemstones from paydirt. Its convenient handles and weather-resistant design ensure you can sift through your findings in any outdoor condition.

To make your discovery even easier, the kit includes a trowel, brush, and magnifying tweezers - perfect for collecting, cleaning, and studying your precious finds. These essential tools are designed for gemstone enthusiasts, hobbyists, or anyone looking to experience the thrill of prospecting.

The 5pc Gemstone Gold Rush Kit comes complete with 1lb of gemstone material, a sifting sieve, a trowel, a brush, and tweezers, offering you everything you need to get started. Whether you’re exploring the great outdoors or just enjoying a hands-on project at home, this kit makes gemstone prospecting fun and easy. Get ready to dig, sift, and discover your next treasure with this perfect set for outdoor adventurers and aspiring gem hunters!
